title: The Secrets of the Riddle Mansion

scenes.text: An old mansion hides a dark mystery dating back decades.
It happened in Burlington, New Jersey.
In 1928, the Riddle Mansion was the site of a mysterious disappearance of its owner, Albert Riddle.
The mansion still stands, holding onto its secrets.
Despite investigations, Riddle was never found, and theories abound.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Burlington, USA - 1928. Albert Riddle vanished from the Riddle Mansion, leaving behind an array of unanswered questions. The mystery remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
